nasb.text: For the promise to Abraham or to his descendants that he would be heir of the world was not through the Law, but through the righteousness of faith.

esv.text: For the promise to Abraham and his offspring that he would be heir of the world did not come through the law but through the righteousness of faith.

cnv.text: 原來　神給亞伯拉罕和他後裔承受世界的應許，並不是因著律法，而是藉著因信而來的義。

ccb.text: 上帝应许将世界赐给亚伯拉罕和他的后裔，不是因为亚伯拉罕遵行了律法，而是因为他因信而成了义人。

csbs.text: 原来，赐给亚伯拉罕和他后裔继承世界的应许，不是藉着律法，而是藉着因信而得的义。
